转换 = switch between modes/channels (technical, reversible); 转化 = convert/transform substance or nature into sth new; 转变 = shift direction or stance (abstract, purposeful); 改造 = physically remodel or restructure; 改变 = intentionally change (broad, everyday)

供应 = supply goods/materials (commercial, ongoing flow); 供给 = supply in economic sense (econ. term, supply-demand); 供 = provide for (literary/formal base verb); 提供 = provide/offer (widest, incl. services, information)
偷 = steal covertly (everyday verb); 盗窃 = theft/steal (legal/formal, written); 抢 = snatch or rob by force (overt violence)
走进 = walk/step into (physical, directional movement); 进入 = enter (broad: place, field, phase); 入 = enter/join (literary or compound base)
转弯 = turn a corner (vehicle/road, neutral); 拐弯 = turn a corner (slightly colloquial, also fig. 'beat around the bush'); 转身 = turn one's body around (person, not a road)
懂 = understand intuitively (know how/what, colloquial); 理解 = grasp meaning through reasoning; 领会 = comprehend through instruction or reflection; 清楚 = clear-headed, know clearly (also adj.)

检测 = detect/measure (instrument or sensor); 检验 = inspect/test quality or validity; 检查 = routine check/inspection (medical or compliance); 测验 = classroom quiz or test; 考验 = life/moral ordeal, trial; 化验 = lab assay/analysis; 探测 = probe/detect remotely (instruments, space)
中奖 = win by chance (lottery, lucky draw); 获奖 = receive a merit-based award/prize; 赢 = win (competition, game — broadest)
谈话 = a talk or conversation (can be noun; often semi-formal); 谈 = talk/discuss (general verb); 商量 = consult and talk it over (informal, mutual)
增强 = strengthen/enhance quality or capability; 加强 = reinforce/intensify (often formal: security, ties); 增加 = increase in quantity or amount (quantitative)
围 = surround or wrap (verb, physical action); 包围 = encircle/surround completely (military or tight closure); 周围 = surroundings, the area around (location noun/adverb)
结 = tie a knot (general, also: knot as noun); 捆绑 = bind/tie up tightly (restraining a person or bundle); 系领带 = tie a necktie (specific clothing action)
拍照 = take a still photograph; 摄像 = record video/film (moving image)

中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)
愁 = sad, melancholic worry (diffuse, emotional); 担心 = worry about something specific; 操心 = actively worry on behalf of others; 顾虑 = misgivings/reservations that hold you back
愿 = wish/desire (also used in set phrases); 愿意 = be willing to do sth (neutral); 乐意 = be glad/happy to do sth (positive affect)

总数 = total count/number (noun, refers to a quantity of items); 总和 = sum/total (noun, mathematical); 共计 = to total, amounts to (verb/adv, formal); 总共 = in total (adverb, pure quantity); 共 = together/in total (shortest, also means 'together')
火车 = train (everyday spoken word); 列车 = train (formal/written, also used for scheduled train services)
游客 = tourist (sightseeing, leisure traveler); 旅客 = traveler/passenger (any traveler, incl. transit)

培训班 = training class (a scheduled course/class); 培训 = vocational training (the process, workplace-oriented); 培养 = nurture/develop over time (people, skills, habits); 训练 = drill/train (repeated practice, sport or military)

宁静 = serene (of environment/atmosphere, poetic); 安宁 = peaceful tranquility (freedom from disturbance); 平静 = calm (of a state or mood, neutral); 镇静 = composure, calm oneself down (after agitation); 沉着 = cool-headed under pressure (personality, action context)

懂得 = know how to / understand (intuitive grasp, often of principles); 了解 = know about / find out (factual knowledge, investigation); 理解 = understand (grasp meaning/reasoning); 领会 = comprehend by guidance (absorb instruction/spirit); 清楚 = clear / understand clearly (adj. and verb)
之下 = under/beneath (abstract hierarchy: rule, pressure, conditions); 地下 = underground (physical location, also fig. clandestine)
转向 = change direction / pivot (vehicle, policy, broad turn); 回头 = turn one's head back / return; also colloquial 'later'; 拐弯 = turn a corner (physical, road/path)
交警 = traffic police specifically; 警察 = police / police officer (general term); 警方 = the police as an institution / police side (used in news)
电视剧 = TV drama/series (medium-specific); 连续剧 = serial/series (emphasises ongoing episodes); 戏剧 = drama/theater (art form, stage or screen); 悲剧 = tragedy (a genre, also fig. 'a tragedy')

宝 = treasure (noun, also term of endearment); 宝贵 = valuable (experience, time, opportunities — abstract); 珍贵 = precious (rare objects, keepsakes, memories); 珍稀 = rare and scarce (species, resources — emphasises rarity)
大爷 = polite address to an older man / paternal uncle (father's elder brother); 叔叔 = uncle (father's younger brother, also polite address to middle-aged man); 舅舅 = uncle (mother's brother)
观看 = watch/view (entertainment, a performance, screen); 观察 = observe/study (with attention, scientific or investigative)
走过 = walk past (simple motion past a point); 经过 = pass through / by (also means 'the process of', broader); 穿越 = pass through / traverse (crossing through a space, also time-travel fiction)
向 = towards (preposition/direction marker); 方向 = direction (noun, the course one heads); 导向 = orientation/guide toward (institutional or ideological steering)
禁止 = prohibit/ban (a rule or sign that forbids); 取缔 = crack down on and shut down (authorities actively suppress an illegal activity)

懂得 = know through experience/intuition (often: know how to); 理解 = grasp the meaning intellectually; 了解 = find out / know about (facts); 领会 = comprehend by following instruction; 清楚 = understand clearly / be clear on

急 = hurried/urgent (general, also emotional impatience); 紧急 = urgent as emergency/crisis (objective); 紧迫 = pressing time pressure; 迫切 = urgent felt need/desire; 急切 = eagerly impatient (anxious tone); 焦急 = anxious worry
无疑 = undoubtedly (speaker asserts certainty with no doubt); 果然 = sure enough / as expected (confirms a prior prediction)
美金 = US dollar (informal/spoken, mainland China); 美元 = US dollar (neutral formal term used in writing and official contexts)
乡村 = countryside/rural area (pastoral, cultural concept); 村 = a specific village (settlement); 农村 = rural/farming area (administrative or economic framing)
墙壁 = wall (emphatic compound; both characters mean wall; used in descriptive/formal contexts); 墙 = wall (everyday basic term)
库 = warehouse/storehouse (single morpheme; often a suffix in compounds: 图书库, 数据库); 仓库 = warehouse (the standard standalone word)
暖 = warm (basic adjective/verb for temperature); 温暖 = warm (richer; also figurative emotional warmth)
湿 = wet or moist (something soaked/dampened); 潮湿 = damp/humid (ambient moisture, environment)
动摇 = waver in resolve/conviction (figurative, about willpower or stance); 摇 = physically shake or rock; 摇摆 = sway back and forth (physical or figurative indecision)
招手 = wave/beckon to attract someone's attention; 挥 = wave/brandish (swing an arm, weapon, etc.) without the beckoning intent
多种 = many kinds/varieties (stresses quantity of types); 各种 = all kinds/every sort (stresses variety covering each type)
西部 = the western part/region (geographic section of a country or area); 西方 = the West (civilizational/cultural concept; also used in religion)
摄像机 = video camera (records moving images); 照相机 = still camera (takes photographs)
白 is the adjective/morpheme (白雪, 白天); 白色 is the standalone noun 'the color white' used in naming or labeling.
全身 is neutral 'the whole body'; 浑身 (5k) adds emotional weight, often 'all over / soaked / aching'; 一身 emphasizes a state covering the person (一身汗 = covered in sweat), often in set phrases.

全场 = whole audience/venue; 全部 (5k) = the total amount/all of it; 整 = exactly whole (整十年); 整整 = a full emphatic duration (整整三天); 整个 (5k) = the entire X as modifier; 整体 (5k) = the whole as a unified entity (noun).
全家 = the whole family (emphasis on completeness); 一家 (5k) = the whole family OR one firm/establishment (ambiguous without context).
干什么 asks 'what are you doing?' (action-focused); 干吗 is more colloquial and skews toward 'why? / what for?' (reason-focused), often with impatience.
之内 = within a limit/boundary (written); 以内 = within/not exceeding (often quantitative: 一周以内); 之中 (5k) = amid/within a set or space (书中之中 — more literary, spatial or figurative).

宽 (5k) = wide in physical dimension (宽两米); 广 = broad/extensive (often figurative or as morpheme); 宽广 = wide and spacious (combined adj., formal); 广阔 (5k) = vast expanse of space or prospects (literary).
窗子 and 窗户 (5k) both mean 'window' and are nearly interchangeable in speech; 窗子 is slightly more colloquial/northern, 窗户 is the standard everyday form.
老婆 (5k) = wife (casual/intimate); 妻子 = wife (standard/neutral written); 太太 (5k) = Mrs./wife (polite, slightly formal); 夫人 (5k) = wife (honorific, used for dignitaries or respectfully of others).
将 (5k) is the written/formal future marker (将于明年); 将要 is a slightly fuller written form meaning 'is about to / will soon', closer to 快要 in timing.
不对 = 'that's not right' (colloquial response, mild correction: 不对吧?); 错 = wrong/mistake (can be noun or adj., broader use: 你错了, 犯错).
湿 = wet (direct contact with water: 衣服湿了); 潮湿 (5k) = damp/moist (ambient humidity, climate, walls — not fully wet).
树林 = woods/grove (smaller, local stand of trees); 森林 (5k) = forest (large-scale, ecological term).
合同 (5k) = contract (legally binding, commercial); 协议书 = written agreement (broader, may be less formal than a contract — MOUs, protocols).
冬 (5k) = winter (basic morpheme, used in compounds); 冬季 = the winter season (fuller, used in weather forecasts, formal contexts).
西方 (5k) = 'the West' as a cultural/political entity or compass direction; 西部 = the western part/region of a country or area (geographic subdivision).
全年 = the whole year / annual (total: 全年产量); 终年 (5k) = all year round OR age at death (literary); 常年 (5k) = year-round habitually / for years on end (habitual duration).
错 = general wrong/mistake (everyday); 失误 (5k) = a slip-up or operational error (performance context — sports, work); 疏忽 (5k) = negligence, oversight (blame/duty context).
错 = general wrong/mistake (adj+noun); 不对 = predicative spoken judgment ('that's not right'); 失误 = concrete performance slip (sports/work); 疏忽 = careless lapse due to inattention
协议书 = written agreement/MOU (may be non-binding or informal in register); 合同 = formal legally binding contract
通知书 = one-way written notice (authority → recipient); 协议书 = bilateral written agreement between parties
弟 = morpheme used in compounds (兄弟, 弟子); 弟弟 = standalone colloquial word for younger brother
妹 = morpheme used in compounds (姐妹, 妹夫); 妹妹 = standalone colloquial word for younger sister
黄 = pure color adjective (yellow); 黄色 = yellow as a noun-modifier, and colloquially pornographic/lewd content
地带 = general zone/belt (any area); 温带 = specifically the temperate climate zone (geographic term)
